method: Ranks #16-30 batch (MCC3, DNC7, RUCD, DNCA, PQCS; MTCG dropped - matures 2026-06-30). Skeleton terms from BYMA open-data ficha tecnica (open.bymadata.com.ar vanoms-be-core free endpoint, fetched 2026-06-11), verified against primary documents where retrievable (Edenor Clase 7 Final Offering Memorandum Feb-2026, Edenor SEC 6-Ks Apr/May-2026 incl. 1Q26 presentation, MSU Energy unaudited interim financial statements 30-09-2025 Note 10) and against two independent pricing models (argen.bond cashflow tables, Docta Capital SSR-embedded metrics). Remaining cashflows per 100 VN original face for payments strictly after 2026-06-10, scheduled dates, each bond's day count. Golden TIR: D-line dirty close (data912 /live/arg_corp 2026-06-10), settlement 2026-06-11, effective-annual act/365 IRR via bisection vs Docta Capital published 'tea'/'tir' at the identical dirty price.
generalCaveats: Payment dates are scheduled dates; weekend/holiday dates roll to the next business day without additional interest (30/360 classes unadjusted by construction; for the act/365 local classes argen.bond/docta also accrue to scheduled date). Weekend scheduled dates noted per instrument.

MCC3 day count (actual/365) is inferred from two independent calculators (argen.bond coupon table reproduces 7.5*days/365 exactly; docta accrued interest = rate*days/365), NOT from the aviso de suscripcion/suplemento, which could not be retrieved online - verify on CNV AIF before relying on exact coupon amounts (max impact ~0.06 per 100 per coupon vs 30/360). PQCS act/365 was UPGRADED to primary-verified on 2026-06-11: the Clase S Aviso de Suscripcion (petrini.com.ar PDF) states 'cantidad real de dias transcurridos/365' verbatim.
RUCD and DNCA day count 30/360 assumed (NY-law international notes standard; DNCA same program/format as Clase 7 whose OM states 30/360 explicitly); their offering memoranda were not retrieved.

argen.bond headline YTMs for DNC7D (8.86%) and RUCDD (9.40%) are inconsistent with their own cashflow tables and with Docta; Docta TEA used as the published golden benchmark (same dirty price as data912 close).
Docta metadata mislabels DNC7D law as 'Ley Argentina' - the Final Offering Memorandum states the Notes and Indenture are governed by NY law (capacity/corporate matters by Argentine law).
MTCG (Mastellone 10.95% 2026-06-30, rank in inventory) intentionally excluded: matures this month.

instruments.name: Edenor ON Clase 7 (Senior Notes) 9,75% 2030 (USD, Ley NY)

issuer.legalName: Empresa Distribuidora y Comercializadora Norte S.A. (EDENOR S.A.)

instruments.isinDetail: BYMA line = RegS USP3710FAU86 (CUSIP P3710F AU8); 144A US29244AAM45 (CUSIP 29244A AM4) trades offshore - both per SEC 6-K 2026-04-29 tender results.
instruments.currencyOfPaymentEvidence: 6-K: 'Senior Notes Class 7, denominated and payable in U.S. Dollars abroad'; OM: denominated in U.S. Dollars, payments of principal and interest in U.S. Dollars.
instruments.amountNotes: U.S.$385,000,000 issued under base indenture dated 2024-10-24 (original + exchange tranches), + U.S.$90,000,000 additional notes Feb-2026 (third supplemental indenture) = 475,000,000; minus U.S.$175,000,000 repurchased and cancelled in the Apr-2026 cash tender (early settlement 2026-04-30) = 300,000,000 (BYMA ficha montoResidual 300,000,000; 1Q26 presentation 'reducing Senior Note Class 7 to USD 300 M'). Tender cancels notes pro-rata across holders; per-100-VN-original cashflows of remaining notes unchanged.

goldenCheck.priceSource: data912.com /live/arg_corp close (c) 2026-06-10; dirty USD per 100 VN original
goldenCheck.method: effective annual IRR, act/365, bisection on spec remainingCashflows vs dirty D-line price

notes: BYMA open-data ficha tecnica used as exchange-level source for all five (ISIN, amortization form, min denomination, outstanding, issue/maturity dates); fetched 2026-06-11.

Key findings this batch: (1) RUCD amortizes 17.5/17.5/65 (issuer FS) - NOT the 33/33/34 pattern BYMA's unquantified 'en tres cuotas' might suggest; (2) DNC7 outstanding fell 475M -> 300M via the Apr-2026 cash tender (settled 2026-04-30) funded by the new Clase 10 (DNCA) - tendered notes cancelled, per-100-VN cashflows of survivors unchanged; (3) MCC3 was issued 2026-05-11 (one month ago) - several press summaries misdate it to 2025; (4) local-law MEP classes (MCC3, PQCS) accrue act/365 with varying coupons per the calculators, while the NY-law internationals (DNC7, RUCD, DNCA) pay flat 30/360 coupons; (5) docta labels DNC7D 'Ley Argentina' - wrong per OM (NY law).

Golden TIR benchmark source: Docta Capital SSR 'tea' (effective annual at the same data912 dirty close, settlement 2026-06-11). All five pass with |delta| <= 0.0101pp. argen.bond cashflow tables used as second independent structure check (its headline YTMs for DNC7D/RUCDD are internally inconsistent and were not used).
IAMC Informe Diario de Deuda Corporativa (used in part3) now requires login (unauthorizedlogin redirect) - not used this batch.

Outstanding open items: MCC3 aviso de suscripcion (day count + business-day convention; PQCS aviso retrieved 2026-06-11 and verified), DNCA offering memorandum (day count, 144A ISIN, true minimum denomination - possibly US$100 like Clase 7), RUCD offering memorandum (day count, 144A ISIN, offshore denominations).

ADVERSARIAL VERIFICATION PASS 2026-06-11: all five instruments re-checked against sources not used in the spec build (IOL titles, Rava titles, oblible, cbonds search, MSU 1Q25 earnings presentation, PCR Clase S Aviso de Suscripcion PDF). All five golden IRRs independently recomputed from the spec remainingCashflows at data912 close (re-fetched: MCC3D 101.0, DNC7D 108.2, RUCDD 105.75, DNCAD 105.1, PQCSD 102.4 - unchanged) and docta SSR tea re-fetched (timestamps 2026-06-11T03:13Z): MCC3 7.5251 vs 7.5150 (+0.0101pp), DNC7 7.4988 vs 7.4973 (+0.0015pp), RUCD 8.2164 vs 8.2149 (+0.0015pp), DNCA 8.7994 vs 8.7983 (+0.0011pp), PQCS 8.1816 vs 8.1816 (0.0000pp) - all pass. Coupon arithmetic (act/365 day counts per period; 30/360 step-downs on 66.67/33.34/82.5/65 residuals), amortization sums to 100, weekend-date claims, docta dtm-to-maturity mapping, and DNC7 tender math (385+90-175=300M) all re-derived exactly. No errors found; PQCS day count and minimum denomination upgraded from inferred to primary-verified (Aviso de Suscripcion). No canje-basis issue: docta's published tea sits on the same D-line dirty close for all five (C-lines trade lower: MCC3C 97.7, DNC7C 104.65, DNCAC 101.25).
